creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Sat, Apr 17, 2010 at 20:02:11 +0000, sylvio@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Synopsis: [PATCH] devel/cdialog: update to 1.1.20100119
> 
> State-Changed-From-To: open->closed
> State-Changed-By: sylvio
> State-Changed-When: Sat Apr 17 20:02:11 UTC 2010
> State-Changed-Why: 
> Committed, with minor changes. Thanks!
> 
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=145776

I don't think the changes here are suitable.  Using
"dialog.tar.gz" in distinfo is absolutely a bad idea,
which causes problems while we updating this port to next release.

On ftp site in MASTER_SITES, dialog.tar.gz is a symbolic link to
dialog-1.1-20100119.tgz , however which is not on the http site.
If you want to add http site in MASTER_SITES, maybe contact the
author is a good way.

I suggest you use the original patch.

Thanks,
	Li-Wen

-- 
Li-Wen Hsu <lwhsu AT FreeBSD.org>
http://lwhsu.org
